name: Laquita Wooten
ai_summary: Laquita Wooten is a stay-at-home mom of a two-year-old and eight-month-old with a passion for working with children. She is located in Atlanta, GA and available for both full-time and part-time positions, willing to travel up to 15 miles.

transcripts.q3: Hello, my name is repeatable in. I'm a mom to a two-year-old and eight-month-old. I've always loved kids. I've been a stay-at-home mom for the last two years, and I want to expand and venture out. I want to work around kids, the idea of being able to help and give kids what they need to grow. And develop is something I'm very passionate about
transcripts.q4: I am located in Atlanta, Georgia and I'll travel up to 10 to 15 Mile to pick up shoes.
transcripts.q5: I am looking for both part-time and full-time positions.
